title: Quality Assurance Specialist
description:
Located in Meolo (Venice), Cipriani Industria is the manufacturing division of the Cipriani Group, where tradition, craftsmanship, and innovation come together to create products recognized worldwide for their exceptional quality.  

For more than 90 years, the Cipriani name has represented authenticity, excellence, and attention to detail. Every product is developed and manufactured according to the highest standards of quality, food safety, and regulatory compliance, preserving the heritage and reputation of one of Italy's most iconic hospitality and food brands.  

We are currently seeking a Quality Assurance Specialist based at our Meolo manufacturing facility, who will play a key role in ensuring product quality, food safety, regulatory compliance, and continuous improvement across the entire manufacturing process.  

  

**Requirements*** Bachelor's or Master's Degree in Food Science, Food Technology, Biology, Chemistry, Microbiology, or a related scientific discipline.
* Minimum of 5 years' experience in Quality Assurance, Food Safety, or Regulatory Affairs within the food manufacturing industry.
* Strong knowledge of BRCGS, HACCP, GMP, food legislation, FDA requirements, food labeling, traceability, and Food Safety Management Systems.
* Proven experience managing supplier qualification, audits, quality systems, CAPA, and technical documentation.
* Excellent analytical, organizational, and problem\-solving skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast\-paced manufacturing environment.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office (particularly Excel), ERP systems, and Quality Management Systems (QMS).
* Fluent in both Italian and English.
* Proactive, hands\-on approach with a strong commitment to quality, craftsmanship, and continuous improvement.

**Key Responsibilities*** Ensure the highest standards of product quality, food safety, and regulatory compliance throughout the manufacturing process.
* Monitor production activities to ensure compliance with company procedures, product specifications, hygiene standards, GMP, HACCP, BRCGS, and applicable regulatory requirements.
* Review and approve production records, product specifications, recipes, labels, and batch documentation.
* Prepare, maintain, and update technical documentation, product specifications, and labeling in collaboration with cross\-functional teams.
* Manage quality documentation for internally manufactured and externally sourced products, ensuring accuracy and regulatory compliance.
* Qualify, monitor, and periodically evaluate suppliers and contract manufacturers through audits, technical assessments, and performance reviews.
* Coordinate product sampling, laboratory analyses, shelf\-life studies, and product validation activities.
* Investigate non\-conformities, customer complaints, and food safety incidents, implementing effective Corrective and Preventive Actions (CAPA).
* Support product withdrawal and recall activities when required.
* Maintain and continuously improve the Food Safety \& Quality Management System, ensuring compliance with BRCGS certification standards.
* Monitor changes in food legislation and regulatory requirements related to products, packaging, labeling, ingredients, and export markets.
* Support sustainability and ESG initiatives by ensuring compliance with environmental regulations and supplier certification requirements.
* Participate in new product development and industrialization projects, providing quality and regulatory guidance.
* Plan and coordinate internal, supplier, customer, and certification audits.
* Act as the primary quality contact for suppliers, laboratories, certification bodies, customers, and regulatory authorities.
* Develop and deliver training programs on quality, food safety, hygiene, allergen management, and Good Manufacturing Practices.
* Monitor Quality KPIs and prepare reports to support business decisions and continuous improvement initiatives.
* Promote a culture of quality, food safety, operational excellence, sustainability, and continuous improvement throughout the organization.

**Benefits*** Competitive compensation package
* Continuous learning and professional development opportunities.
* Career growth within the Cipriani Group.
* Dynamic and international working environment.
* Opportunity to collaborate with Cipriani businesses and projects across Italy and internationally.




Birxxslehk

title: Internship Financial Risk | Verona
description:
**Internship Financial Risk \| Verona**  


*The chance to build a better future is right in front of you*  


***Do Work That Matters*** **\- Your role and responsibilities**Do you want to pursue a profession that is truly meaningful and impactful? At KPMG, you will have the opportunity to help clients, the company and colleagues address and solve the most current and complex challenges. **KPMG Advisory** offers consulting services to companies to assist them in business model transformation, process improvement and digitisation, risk analysis and management, and support in extraordinary finance transactions. When you join the Financial Risk team in Verona*,* you are going to work on projects in the field of Risk Management, with a focus both on regulatory and organizational aspects of competence and on the development and validation of modeling for top\-tier clients in the Financial Services sector.  

  

  

Specifically, you will be tasked with:  


* Credit and Market Risk;
* Operational Risk;
* Liquidity and Interest Rate Risk;
* Insurance Risk;
* Regulatory and ESG Risk

  


***Come As*** ***You Are \- Your skills and characteristics***This is the perfect opportunity for you if:


* have a specialist degree (graduate or nearing completion) in finance or quantitative field (statistics, mathematics);
* have excellent knowledge of English, preferably with study and/or work experience abroad;
* have an excellent knowledge of Microsoft Office;
* knowledge of programming software and languages (Python, SAS, R, Matlab and Stata).

  


***Your Future With Us \- What you’ll find at KPMG***


* An **inclusive** and equitable **work environment** that respects, encourages and values **diversity.**
* A challenging and dynamic environment that encourages **creativity** and **teamwork.**
* **Hybrid** work arrangements to promote a healthy work\-life balance.
* Advanced **training** and development programmes to stay current.
* **International** **mindset** and **innovative projects.**
* Initiatives focused on **mental and physical well\-being.**

  

  

***Together for Better – Our values and commitment***



Leadership, teamwork, respect every individual, continuous learning, transparency, commitment to the community and integrity. These are the **KPMG** **values** that create an environment that encourages the sharing of ideas and knowledge, so our professionals can **achieve their full potential**.



As a result of our commitment to fostering an **inclusive work** environment, our Network complies with the standards of the **ISO 30415** requirements, on the Diversity and Inclusion Management System, and **UNI PdR 125**, relating to gender equality”. Within our **Impact Plan** \- Our Impact Plan (kpmg.com) \- you will find summarised all the concrete actions we are taking on environmental, social and governance (ESG) issues.

  


**Join us!**


*Your data will be processed in full compliance with the provisions of Regulation (EU) no. 679/2016 (General Data Protection Regulation \- “GDPR”), as amended. For more information, please see KPMG’s privacy policy**.*


*KPMG Advisory S.p.A. is an equal opportunity employer.*
company_description: At KPMG, you'll be able to tap into your skills, expertise and passion to help organizations find sustainable solutions to the world's most pressing issues.

title: R&D Product Development Engineer
description:
**Date:** Jul 10, 2026


**Location:** Badia Polesine (RO), IT, 45021


**Company:** Dentsply Sirona, Inc


**Requistion ID**: 83764  


  

Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies, with over a century of innovation and service to the dental industry and patients worldwide. Dentsply Sirona develops, manufactures, and markets a comprehensive solutions offering including dental and oral health products as well as other consumable medical devices under a strong portfolio of world class brands.  



Dentsply Sirona’s products provide innovative, high\-quality, and effective solutions to advance patient care and deliver better and safer dental care. Dentsply Sirona’s headquarter is located in Charlotte, North Carolina. The company’s shares are listed in the United States on NASDAQ under the symbol XRAY. Visit www.dentsplysirona.com for more information about Dentsply Sirona and its products.  



  

For our manufacturing site in Badia Polesine (RO), we are looking for a:  


**R\&D Product Development Engineer**  



As part of the **Research \& Development** team, you will play a key role in the development of new silicone formulations for medical devices intended for international markets. You will be involved in laboratory activities, performance testing, and stability studies, while also contributing to the preparation of the technical and regulatory documentation required for FDA registration processes and the development of Private Label products. Working closely with cross\-functional teams, you will support innovation and contribute to the success of our product development projects.  


**Responsibilities**
* Carry out product and material development activities, ensuring the continuous improvement of existing products while meeting commercial launch timelines.
* Coordinate and manage product development activities, from the concept phase through to production support during the scale\-up process from laboratory to manufacturing.
* Participate in the creation and maintenance of bills of materials (BOMs), work instructions, and production specifications.
* Collaborate with suppliers in the qualification of new raw materials and components.
* Ensure technical compliance, product quality, and adherence to regulatory and market requirements.
* Provide the R\&D Documentation Specialist with data and reports required for the preparation of product technical documentation.
* Identify root causes of non\-conformities and propose appropriate corrective actions.

  


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in a scientific discipline such as Chemistry, Industrial Chemistry, Pharmaceutical Chemistry and Technology (CTF), or a related field.
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and decision\-making skills.
* Results\-oriented mindset and ability to work effectively toward objectives.
* Agility and intellectual curiosity, with a genuine interest in change, innovation, and continuous learning.
* Strong teamwork and collaboration skills.
* Good command of written and spoken English.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office and general computer applications.
* Alignment with the company values of **Respect** (for company standards, vision, colleagues, customers, processes, and work instructions), **Accountability**, **Collaboration**, **Reliability**, and **Agility** (continuous improvement).

  

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:** Dentsply Sirona is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will be considered without unlawful discrimination or regard for race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, sexual or gender identity, national or ethnic origin, age, marital status, disability, genetic factors, military and veteran status, or any other characteristics protected by applicable local law.
**Eligibility:** All successful applicants must be eligible to work in the country the position is based.
**Assistance:** If you need assistance with completing the online application due to a disability, please send an accommodation request to accommodationrequest@dentsplysirona.com.
**Agencies:** Please note that Dentsply Sirona does not accept or respond to unsolicited requests or applications submitted by Recruitment Agencies/ Search Firms.
**Notice on Fraudulent Job Offers:** Unfortunately, we are aware of third parties that pretend to represent our company offering unauthorized employment opportunities. If you think a fraudulent source is offering you a job, please have a look at the following information: careers.dentsplysirona.com.
company_description: Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies.

title: Product Compliance & Certification Specialist
description:
Xylem is a Fortune 500 global water solutions company dedicated to advancing sustainable impact and empowering the people who make water work every day. As a leading water technology company with 23,000 employees operating in over 150 countries, Xylem is at the forefront of addressing the world's most critical water challenges. We invite passionate individuals to join our team, dedicated to exceeding customer expectations through innovative and sustainable solutions.

**THE ROLE**  

The Product Compliance \& Certification Specialist is responsible for ensuring product compliance with applicable safety, regulatory, and certification requirements across global markets. The role partners with Product Management, Engineering, Manufacturing, Sourcing, customers, and certification bodies to support product development, market access, and regulatory compliance throughout the product lifecycle.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Monitor global regulations, standards, and market requirements for electromechanical products.
* Support Product Management and Engineering in defining and maintaining compliant product specifications.
* Coordinate testing, certifications, product approvals, and registrations with external laboratories and certification agencies.
* Assess compliance impacts for ETO projects and provide guidance on product safety requirements.
* Maintain certification, standards, and regulatory databases.
* Provide compliance expertise, technical documentation, and training to internal stakeholders.
* Monitor regulatory changes and support continuous improvement initiatives.

**Qualifications**

* Degree or Diploma in Electrical Engineering, Environmental Engineering, or equivalent.
* 3–5 years of experience in product compliance, certification, product safety, or related technical fields.
* Ability to interpret technical standards and test reports.

**Key Competencies**

* Strong collaboration and communication skills.
* Proactive, detail\-oriented, and results\-driven mindset.
* Ability to work effectively in cross\-functional and international environments.
* Continuous improvement and innovation mindset.

**CONTRACT:** Permanent, full time \- Hybrid

**LOCATION:** Montecchio Maggiore (VI)

**BENEFIT:** company bonus and company canteen


Join the global Xylem team to be a part of innovative technology solutions transforming water usage, conservation, and re\-use. Our products impact public utilities, industrial sectors, residential areas, and commercial buildings, with a commitment to providing smart metering, network technologies, and advanced analytics for water, electric, and gas utilities. Partner with us in creating a world where water challenges are met with ingenuity and dedication; where we recognize the power of inclusion and belonging in driving innovation and allowing us to compete more effectively around the world.

title: DOL TAP Facilitator - (Part-time) - Vicenza, Italy
description:
Available in 3 locations


**DOL TAP Facilitator \- (Part\-time) \- Vicenza, Italy**
---------------------------------------------------------


Available in 3 locations
Vicenza, IT, 36100
 US Army Garrison Vicenza, IT
 Vicenza, IT
Vicenza, IT, 36100
Category: Counseling/Support/Outreach
Job ID: 18295
widget: Part\-Time
None
No \- Teleworking not available for this position
$39520\-$75339\.58
  
### **Position Description \& Qualifications**

  

  

**JOIN OUR TEAM** to assist and prepare \~200,000 service members who separate annually from the United States Military begin a new life chapter as a civilian. The Department of Labor (DOL) Veterans’ Employment and Training Service (VETS) program requires contractor services to support these transitioning Servicemembers through its highly successful Transition Assistance Program (TAP) that is offered world\-wide to conduct job assistance workshops, employment counseling, as well as connection to approved government and non\-government partners. Our team ensures servicemembers and their families have the necessary career tools and information to seamlessly transition into the civilian workforce.


The DOL VETS TAP program is in need of a skilled and compassionate **Facilitator** who has prior experience teaching and/or instructing military personnel transitioning to civilian professional and vocational occupations.


In this role, you will:


* Teach and/or instruct military personnel transitioning to civilian professional and vocational occupations
* Guide transitioning military service members in identifying goals along with recognizing any employment or education gaps
* Provide transitioning service members (Active, Reserve, National Guard), family members, and veterans a comprehensive understanding of preparing for civilian employment, job searching, job application processes, networking, technical training opportunities and credentialing
* Assist in preparing for civilian employment and participation in technical programs and schools
* Conduct small and large group instruction on the job search process
* Deliver standardized curriculum via in\-person or virtual classrooms
* Complete administrative tasks in a timely manner to include travel expense and classroom reports

Additional information:


* Facilitator will be assigned to a location within a hub that has designated satellite locations
* Any facilitation assignment that is greater than 50 miles from facilitator’s assigned location, then, travel will be reimbursed
* 80 hours of paid comprehensive initial training is provided and expected to be completed within the first month of employment
* Part\-time facilitators’ schedules can vary weekly. Generally, facilitators work 2 – 3 days consecutively

To be successful in this role, you will have:


* Requires Bachelor’s degree in a related field; or
	+ An Associate’s Degree in a related field and four (4\) years of recent specialized experience working as a Workforce Solutions or HR Specialist; or
	+ A major certification and six (6\) years of recent specialized experience; or
	+ A High School Diploma and eight (8\) years of recent specialized experience
* Experience which demonstrates understanding of private and public sector employment processes
* Must be knowledgeable of the workplace, jobs, and requirement for entry into those jobs
* Must demonstrate the ability to provide standardized training to groups with up to 50 participants
* Familiar with MS Windows and Office
* Ability to effectively communicate with Military clients and Government representatives
* Comfortability instructing and speaking in front of a group, be observant of others, possess the ability to professionally engage with a diverse audience
* Ability to work extended hours, including weekdays, weekends, and some holidays if required
* Must have excellent time management skills, able to work independently and follow directions
* Must have ability to respond to emergent facilitation assignments
* Ability to meet country specific employment requirements such as ECOPS
* The ability to travel up to 10%

If you are interested in supporting and working with our military and a passionate Serco team\- then submit your application now for immediate consideration. It only takes a few minutes and could change your career!


Military Veterans and Spouses encouraged to apply.

  

  

### **Company Overview**

  

  

Serco Inc. (Serco) is the Americas division of Serco Group, plc. In North America, Serco’s 9,000\+ employees strive to make an impact every day across 100\+ sites in the areas of Defense, Citizen Services, and Transportation. We help our clients deliver vital services more efficiently while increasing the satisfaction of their end customers. Serco serves every branch of the U.S. military, numerous U.S. Federal civilian agencies, the Intelligence Community, the Canadian government, state, provincial and local governments, and commercial clients. While your place may look a little different depending on your role, we know you will find yours here. Wherever you work and whatever you do, we invite you to discover your place in our world. Serco is a place you can count on and where you can make an impact because every contribution matters.
  

  

To review Serco benefits please visit: https://careers.serco\-na.com/us/en/what\-we\-offer. If you require an accommodation with the application process please email: careers@serco\-na.com or call the HR Service Desk at 800\-628\-6458, option 1\. Please note, due to EEOC/OFCCP compliance, Serco is unable to accept resumes by email.
  

  

Candidates may be asked to present proof of identify during the selection process. If requested, this will require presentation of a government\-issued I.D. (with photo) with name and address that match the information entered on the application. Serco will not take possession of or retain/store the information provided as proof of identity. For more information on how Serco uses your information, please see our Applicant Privacy Policy and Notice.
  

  

Serco does not accept unsolicited resumes through or from search firms or staffing agencies without being a contracted approved vendor. All unsolicited resumes will be considered the property of Serco and will not be obligated to pay a placement or contract fee. If you are interested in becoming an approved vendor at Serco, please email Agencies@serco\-na.com.
  

  

Serco is an equal opportunity employer. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status, and other legally protected characteristics.

  

  

### **Pay Transparency**

  

  

Our Total Rewards package includes competitive pay, performance\-based incentives, and benefits that promote well\-being and work\-life balance—so you can thrive both professionally and personally. Eligible employees also gain access to a wide range of benefits from comprehensive health coverage and health savings accounts to retirement plans, life and disability insurance, and time\-off programs that support work\-life balance. Program availability may vary based on factors such as contract type, location, hire date, and applicable collective bargaining agreements.
  

  

Salary range: The range for this position can be found at the top of this posting. This range is provided as a general guideline and represents a good faith estimate across all experience levels. Actual base salary will be determined by a variety of factors, including but not limited to, the scope of the role, relevant experience, job\-related knowledge, education and training, key skills, and geographic market considerations. For roles available in multiple states, the range may vary to reflect differences in local labor markets. In addition to base salary, eligible positions may include other forms of compensation such as annual bonuses or long\-term incentive opportunities. Benefits – Comprehensible benefits for full\-time employees (part\-time employees receive a limited package tailored to their role):  

  

  



* Medical, dental, and vision insurance
* Robust vacation and sick leave benefits, and flexible work arrangements where permitted by role or contract
* 401(k) plan that includes employer matching funds
* Tuition reimbursement program
* Life insurance and disability coverage
* Optional coverages that can be purchased, including pet insurance, home and auto insurance, additional life and accident insurance, critical illness insurance, group legal, ID theft protection
* Birth, adoption, parental leave benefits
* Employee Assistance Plan
  

  

  

To review all Serco benefits please visit: https://careers.serco\-na.com/us/en/about\-us.
  

  

Serco complies with all applicable state and local leave laws, including providing time off under the Colorado Healthy Families and Workplaces Act for eligible Colorado residents, in alignment with our policies and benefit plans. The application window for this position is for no more than 60 days. We encourage candidates to apply promptly after the posting date, as the position may close earlier if filled or if the application volume exceeds expectations. Please submit applications exclusively through Serco’s external (or internal) career site. If an applicant has any concerns with job posting compliance, please send an email to: careers@serco\-na.com.
company_description: Serco is one of the world’s largest providers of public services to governments, employing over 50,000 people in over 20 countries.

title: Impiegato tecnico commerciale
description:
Perin Srl è un'azienda leader nel settore della produzione di calzature di alta qualità, con una consolidata presenza internazionale. Siamo alla ricerca di una figura da inserire come Impiegata/o Tecnico Commerciale per supportare e sviluppare ulteriormente le nostre attività. Non si richiede esperienza pregressa, ma buona volontà e voglia di imparare.

Responsabilità principali

* Collaborazione con il team di sviluppo prodotto per garantire che le esigenze del cliente siano soddisfatte.
* Preparazione di offerte commerciali.
* Inserimento ordini nel sistema Gestionale, con sviluppo di distinte base di articoli e gestione dei consumi di materiali.

Requisiti

* Precisione, affidabilità e attenzione ai dettagli.
* Ottime capacità comunicative e relazionali.
* Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese e tedesca.
* Buona conoscenza dei principali strumenti informatici e del pacchetto Microsoft Office.

Come candidarsi

Se sei interessato/a a questa opportunità e ritieni di avere i requisiti richiesti, invia il tuo CV aggiornato e una lettera di presentazione a Perin@perinspa.it con oggetto "Candidatura".

Perin Srl promuove le pari opportunità e accoglie candidature da tutte le persone qualificate.

Contratto di lavoro: Tempo pieno, Tempo determinato

Retribuzione: a partire da €24\.368,00 all'anno

title: Tecnico trasfertista
Specialista Vendite e Servizi al Cliente - settore ENERGIA | SINERGAS S.p.A. - TORRI DI QUARTESOLO (VI)
description:
Il Gruppo AIMAG è una multiutility con sede a Mirandola, attiva nei servizi pubblici locali e presente in 27 Comuni. Gestisce, direttamente e tramite le società controllate, servizi idrici, ambientali, energetici, tecnologici e di pubblica illuminazione, servendo oltre 290\.000 cittadini. Opera con un forte radicamento territoriale e un impegno concreto verso qualità, continuità del servizio e sostenibilità.


Entrare nel Gruppo AIMAG significa far parte di un’organizzazione dinamica, in cui competenze tecniche, responsabilità verso la comunità e capacità di innovazione rappresentano leve fondamentali per lo sviluppo e la creazione di valore nel tempo.

  

  

**Posizione:**
--------------

Il Gruppo AIMAG ricerca, per **SINERGAS S.p.A**., società operante nella vendita di energia, gas e soluzioni per l’efficienza energetica, una risorsa da inserire con il ruolo di **Specialista Vendite e Servizi al Cliente** presso il nuovo sportello di **Torri di Quartesolo (VI)**.


La persona selezionata, riportando direttamente all’Area Manager e inserita in un team commerciale altamente qualificato, sarà coinvolta in un percorso di formazione finalizzato all’acquisizione delle competenze necessarie per gestire in autonomia il punto vendita.


La risorsa si occuperà di accoglienza e assistenza alla clientela, gestione delle attività amministrative e commerciali di front e back office, promozione dei servizi e delle soluzioni offerte dall’azienda e sviluppo di nuove opportunità commerciali, contribuendo al consolidamento e alla crescita del portafoglio clienti nell’area di riferimento.  

  



  

**Principali Responsabilità**

* Consulenza, vendita e assistenza post\-sale alla clientela: lo scopo è diventare il punto di riferimento dei clienti.
* Ricerca autonoma e attiva di nuovi clienti.
* Promozione e conclusione di contratti per la fornitura di energia, gas e soluzioni per l’efficienza energetica, partendo dalla consulenza fino alla conclusione in totale autonomia delle pratiche.
* Gestione del proprio portafoglio clienti con contatto periodico.
* Collaborazione e contatto con i punti vendita di zona, creazione di sinergie con le figure commerciali del proprio team di lavoro.

**Requisiti:**
--------------

* Diploma di scuola superiore e/o Laurea triennale ad in indirizzo Marketing e Comunicazione.
* Orientamento al cliente e spiccata attitudine commerciale e comunicativa, intraprendenza e dinamismo.
* Propensione alla collaborazione e al lavoro in team.
* Ottima capacità di pianificazione e organizzazione del proprio lavoro.
* Predisposizione al lavoro per obiettivi e orientamento al risultato.
* Profonda conoscenza del territorio di riferimento.
* Automunito/a.
* Gradita provenienza dal settore energetico e/o esperienza nel settore vendite.

**Altre informazioni:**
-----------------------

**Cosa offriamo**

* Percorsi formativi mirati al miglioramento delle competenze tecniche e trasversali.
* Percorso di inserimento strutturato, con onboarding, affiancamento e incontri periodici con il Manager e la Funzione HR.
* Inserimento in Sinergas S.p.A., con con contratto a tempo determinato, che potrà essere attivato in regime di somministrazione, in ottica di successiva stabilizzazione
* Part time, 30 ore dal lunedì al venerdì, sabato opzionabile.
* Inquadramento contrattuale previsto al 4° o 5° livello del CCNL Commercio, in funzione delle competenze e dell'esperienza professionale maturate nel ruolo.
* Fascia retributiva indicativa: RAL compresa tra 17\.000 e 20\.000 euro lordi annui, definita sulla base di criteri oggettivi e neutrali rispetto al genere, quali esperienza professionale coerente, competenze tecniche, livello di autonomia, responsabilità assegnate e coerenza con l’assetto retributivo interno.
* Pacchetto retributivo e benefit:Sistema di incentivazione variabile legato al raggiungimento di obiettivi individuali e aziendali, disciplinato dal Regolamento del “Sistema Incentivante Commerciale” di Sinergas S.p.A. Il premio minimo, erogato in caso di raggiungimento degli obiettivi, è pari a € 400 lordi per trimestre. Dei premi maturati, i primi € 300 complessivi saranno convertiti in welfare aziendale;Buoni pasto del valore nominale di € 10 per ogni giornata lavorativa prevista secondo le policy aziendali;Pc e telefono aziendale.
* Inserimento in un ambiente dinamico e in continuo sviluppo ed evoluzione, in un team consolidato e in una società orientata alla persona e alla conciliazione vita\-lavoro.

 **Sede di lavoro: Torri di Quartesolo (VI).**

 *"Il presente annuncio è rivolto ad entrambi i sessi, ai sensi delle leggi 903/77 e 125/91, e a persone di tutte le età e tutte le nazionalità, ai sensi dei decreti legislativi 215/03 e 216/03\.*

*Il Gruppo AIMAG garantisce pari opportunità di accesso alla selezione, assicurando che il processo sia gestito secondo criteri di equità, trasparenza, non discriminazione e piena coerenza con le politiche aziendali di parità di genere e diversity \& inclusion.*

*Nel corso del processo di selezione non saranno richieste informazioni sulla retribuzione attuale o percepita in precedenti rapporti di lavoro; eventuali aspettative economiche potranno essere raccolte esclusivamente al fine di verificarne la compatibilità con la fascia retributiva approvata per la posizione oggetto della presente selezione.*

*I dati personali saranno trattati da Aimag S.p.A. esclusivamente per finalità di ricerca e selezione del personale, nel rispetto del Regolamento UE 2016/679 (GDPR). Il conferimento dei dati è facoltativo ma necessario per la valutazione della candidatura. Per maggiori informazioni si invita a consultare l’informativa completa: link informativa privacy candidati. Eventuali dati inseriti nel CV non pertinenti alle finalità della selezione non saranno oggetto di valutazione; i CV dovranno contenere esclusivamente informazioni rilevanti per la selezione in oggetto."*

title: Tecnico Sanitario di Radiologia Medica (TSRM) - BELLUNO
description:
SYNLAB è una multinazionale, presente in Europa, Asia, Africa e Sud America, composta da quasi 30 mila dipendenti, che collaborano con il principale obiettivo di migliorare il benessere dei pazienti.


In Italia, con un team di oltre 4 mila professionisti, **SYNLAB rappresenta il più importante e vasto gruppo di diagnostica integrata nei Medical Center e il più importante interlocutore dei servizi di Laboratorio**. Lombardia, Veneto, Friuli\-Venezia Giulia, Toscana, Emilia\-Romagna, Liguria, Lazio e Campania sono le regioni in cui si sviluppa principalmente l'attività di SYNLAB che è comunque presente in tutta Italia con partner accreditati.

  

La Mission: **fornire informazioni diagnostiche utili per una vita sana e per il benessere di tutti**.


La Vision: **una leadership conquistata attraverso l’eccellenza del servizio a favore delle persone e della comunità medica, con una diagnostica di altissima qualità**.


I Valori: **passione, responsabilità e customer centricity.**

  

Scopri di più: https://www.synlab.it

  

  

**Posizione:**
--------------

### **Posizione**

  

Siamo alla ricerca di un TSRM \- Tecnico Sanitario di Radiologia Medica da inserire presso il nostro centro SYNLAB DATA MEDICA di Belluno, che si occuperà delle seguenti attività:

* Gestire il paziente nelle fasi di attesa e durante l’esecuzione della procedura diagnostica fino alla dimissione dello stesso.
* Compilare la scheda ambulatoriale del paziente che contribuisce al suo dossier sanitario per le aree di competenza con relativi questionari di patologia, provvedere a scannerizzare ed importare le indagini diagnostiche esibite.
* Acquisire, elaborare e archiviare immagini, con relativo trasferimento su supporto informatico.
* Collaborare alla conduzione delle procedure diagnostiche, compresi studi dinamici e contrastografici, attenendosi scrupolosamente ai protocolli prestabiliti.
* Coadiuvare l'esperto qualificato ai fini dei controlli di qualità delle apparecchiature.
* Provvedere all’apertura di chiamate di assistenza tecnica, con immediata comunicazione al proprio responsabile di settore.
* Provvedere all'approvvigionamento di materiale dal magazzino di riferimento, all'ordine e alla pulizia delle apparecchiature e della postazione di lavoro.

**Requisiti:**
--------------

### **Requisiti**

  

La risorsa deve possedere:

* Diploma di Laurea di Tecnico Sanitario di Radiologia Medica.
* Iscrizione all’albo professionale.
* Conoscenza delle tecniche radiologiche.
* Frequentazione corsi ECM.
* Assicurazione professionale.
* Conoscenza delle apparecchiature in utilizzo alla Radiologia e/o Medicina Nucleare.
* Competenze tecnica (minima di 1 anno) nell’esecuzione esami con RM BASSO CAMPO, RX, MAMMOGRAFIA, MOC, OPT/CONE BEAM.
* Competenza tecnica (minima di 1 anno) nell’esecuzione di esami con RM ALTO CAMPO, TAC senza e con mezzo di contrasto.

**Altre informazioni:**
-----------------------

**Altre informazioni**

* Sede di lavoro: Belluno (BL)
* Orario: full\-time, 40 ore settimanali (lunedì\-sabato)

**Cosa offriamo**

* Stabilità: assunzione a tempo pieno e indeterminato
* Crescita professionale: reale opportunità di sviluppo professionale in un ambiente strutturato e di eccellenza sul territorio.
* Pacchetto retributivo: CCNL Studi Professionali (2\-3\* livello) range retributivo compreso tra €32\.000 e €40\.000 \+ PDR (premio di risultato) \+ buoni pasto giornalieri \+ formazione ECM gratuita \+ convenzioni e scontistiche di valore (estendibili anche a parenti di primo grado e affini).

*L'offerta si intende rivolta a candidati e candidate, nel rispetto del D. Lgs. n. 198/2006 e ss.mm.ii. e dei Decreti Legislativi n. 215 e n. 216 del 2003 sulle parità di trattamento. Invitiamo chi si candida a leggere l'informativa privacy ai sensi degli artt. 13 e 14 del Reg. EU 679/2016 al seguente indirizzo* *https://www.synlab.it/privacy\-policy*.

title: Sales Specialist- Venezia
description:
Grazie alle recenti acquisizioni di Juice, Rekordata, Med Computer, Med Innovations e ICT, avvenuta nel 2024, **R\-Store** è oggi il principale partner Apple in Italia e tra i più rilevanti al mondo. Con headquarter a Napoli e una presenza in 18 regioni, l’azienda conta 100 negozi, 900 collaboratori e un fatturato di 600 milioni di euro. Oltre al canale retail consumer, supportato da personale altamente qualificato, R\-Store offre soluzioni su misura per aziende, scuole, università e pubblica amministrazione, garantendo un servizio post\-vendita completo come Centro di Assistenza Autorizzato Apple. Dal 2022 il gruppo ha diversificato il business entrando nei settori della Cyber Security e dei dispositivi ricondizionati, fino ad approdare nel 2024 al mondo della fotografia d'autore con l'apertura del primo Leica Store a Napoli

  

  

**Posizione:**
--------------

In ambito Retail (Vendita, Service, Customer Relation) cerchiamo Apple Sales Specialist per il nostro punto vendita di **Venezia**.

 **Cosa farai:**

* Accoglierai ogni cliente con un approccio consulenziale, trasformando ogni interazione in un’esperienza significativa.
* Capirai i bisogni, proporrai soluzioni integrate – prodotti, accessori, protezioni, servizi finanziari e noleggio operativo.
* Cura dell'esposizione dei prodotti nella show room secondo il planogramma schema espositivo) e relativi aggiornamenti, previsti da Apple e da R\-Store.
* Aggiornamento e corretta esposizione del materiale di merchandising.
* Ti relazionerai anche con clienti business e professionisti, offrendo soluzioni su misura grazie alla collaborazione con Rekordata, la società del gruppo dedicata al mondo aziendale
* Ti formerai continuamente grazie alla nostra Academy e ai programmi ufficiali Apple, per diventare un vero esperto della Customer Experience.
* Primo supporto nella risoluzione di problematica di utilizzo dispositivi Apple.

**Requisiti:**
--------------

**Chi cerchiamo?**

  

* Persone curiose con passione per la tecnologia e soprattutto del mondo Apple
* Capacità di ascolto, empatia e orientamento al risultato.
* Esperienza in ambito Retail e preferibilmente nell’elettronica di consumo.
* Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese.

**Altre informazioni:**
-----------------------

**Cosa offriamo:**

  

* Retribuzione fissa (RAL) e bonus mensile fino al 30%, legato a obiettivi chiari misurabili.
* Crescita professionale in un’azienda solida, in espansione e con valori condivisi.

  

* Un sistema di incentivazione meritocratico basato su risultati misurabili.

  

* Percorsi di formazione certificata Apple, con sviluppo di competenze su vendita consulenziale, comunicazione e customer experience.

  

* Opportunità di crescita reale all’interno del gruppo R\-Store, sia nel canale retail che in aree specialistiche come business, education e digital solutions.

  

* Inquadramento: RAL: 23\.000 \- 25\.000 \- 5/ 4 livello CCNL Commercio e Terziario

 **Perché R\-Store**


R\-Store come principale Premium Partner del brand, è a capo di un ecosistema strategico che unisce eccellenze complementari: Rekordata, che trasforma il business con soluzioni tecnologiche su misura, e Clever, il cuore green del gruppo dedicato ai prodotti ricondizionati e alla sostenibilità.


Inoltre, entrerai a far parte di un ambiente in cui le persone rappresentano il valore più importante. Crediamo che il successo di ogni progetto, decisione e innovazione nasca dal contributo di chi lo rende possibile ogni giorno. Per questo mettiamo collaboratori, clienti e partner al centro di ogni processo, valorizzandone competenze, idee e potenziale. In R\-Store promuoviamo una cultura basata sull’ascolto, sulla collaborazione e sulla crescita reciproca, perché siamo convinti che siano le persone a fare davvero la differenza.

title: Beauty Advisor - Thiene (VI)
description:
**Costruisci il tuo futuro con noi**


Il Gruppo Douglas, con oltre 2000 profumerie in 19 paesi europei, è il retailer di riferimento nel mondo della profumeria selettiva. Alla base della crescita e della continua espansione del gruppo ci sono 20\.000 collaboratori qualificati e motivati che amano prendersi cura dei clienti, un assortimento con più di 160\.000 prodotti di bellezza e lifestyle ed un e\-commerce all'avanguardia.


Douglas ispira a vivere la propria **unicità**: la nostra mission è incoraggiare i nostri clienti ad **amarsi** e a celebrare la loro **bellezza** anche attraverso le proprie azioni nel mondo.


Le persone sono il nostro core, ci differenziano e sono l’anima di Douglas.


**Uniti**, rappresentiamo una società **inclusiva**, **diversificata** e **paritaria**. Lavoriamo insieme per un mondo in cui tutti si sentono **visti**, **ascoltati** e **valorizzati**.

Perché in Douglas ognuno di noi è unico: celebriamo **l'individualità**!


Per il nostro punto vendita di**Thiene**, siamo alla ricerca di un/a **Beauty Avdisor**

**OVERVIEW DEL TUO RUOLO**

* Accogliere, assistere e supportare la clientela durante la fase di acquisto;
* Fornire consulenze personalizzate al fine di garantire il pieno soddisfacimento delle esigenze della clientela;
* Collaborare attivamente con il team al fine di raggiungere gli obiettivi qualitativi e quantitativi prestabiliti dall’Azienda;
* Collaborare con il team per garantire l’allestimento dello store secondo le linee guida definite dai diversi Dipartimenti preposti (Marketing, Visual Merchandising...);
* Gestire e assicurare un’efficiente organizzazione del magazzino.

**IL TUO VALORE AGGIUNTO**


* Hai una precedente esperienza di vendita nel settore beauty e hai orientamento commerciale;
* Hai una conoscenza approfondita delle tecniche di make\-up;
* Sei disponibile a lavorare su turni, anche sabato o domenica;
* Ti piace lavorare in un contesto dinamico e hai un forte spirito di iniziativa, curiosità e self motivation;
* Hai ottime capacità relazionali, predisposizione al problem solving e al lavoro in team.

**PERCHÉ UNIRTI A NOI?**


* Perché aiutiamo i nostri clienti a vivere la loro bellezza in modo divertente e innovativo
* Perché offriamo un percorso formativo completo (on the job, digital e in class) per accompagnare la tua crescita professionale
* Perché vivrai in un ambiente stimolante, dinamico, anticipatore dei trend
* Perché hai la possibilità di entrare in un’Azienda multinazionale leader in Europa

**Pacchetto retributivo:**


* RAL compresa tra € 23\.000,00 e 25\.000,00 ccnl Distribuzione Moderna Organizzata, art. 97 e seguenti.


La retribuzione sarà riproporzionata sulla base dell'orario contrattuale.


* Sistema welfare


* Scontistica per i dipendenti e iniziative di well\-being


**È quello che stai cercando?**


Invia la tua candidatura, non vediamo l’ora di conoscerti!

title: IT Support Specialist
description:
Cerchiamo una figura che, partendo dalle attività operative di supporto agli utenti, possa evolvere progressivamente verso un ruolo più ampio di coordinamento del Digital Workplace, gestione dei fornitori tecnologici e supporto ai progetti di innovazione digitale dello Studio.

Nei primi mesi la risorsa sarà coinvolta nelle attività di:

* Supporto agli utenti nelle problematiche quotidiane.
* Gestione delle richieste IT e attività di primo livello.
* Onboarding e offboarding del personale.
* Configurazione e supporto di strumenti Microsoft 365\.
* Gestione dell'inventario hardware e software.
* Coordinamento e monitoraggio degli interventi dei fornitori IT.
* Documentazione delle procedure e delle attività svolte.
* Supporto all'adozione di nuovi strumenti e soluzioni digitali.

Con l'esperienza, la risorsa potrà assumere maggiori responsabilità nell'ambito:

* Digital Workplace.
* User Adoption e formazione interna.
* Coordinamento tecnologico.
* Ottimizzazione dei processi digitali.
* Iniziative legate all'AI e a Microsoft Copilot

La persona selezionata lavorerà principalmente con:

* Microsoft 365
* Outlook
* Teams
* SharePoint
* OneDrive
* Microsoft Copilot
* M\-Files
* Profis
* Studio4
* Soluzioni di gestione accessi e cybersecurity di base (MFA, gestione identità, ecc.)

Cerchiamo una persona che possieda:

* Buona preparazione informatica di base.
* Interesse per le tecnologie Microsoft e il Digital Workplace.
* Forte orientamento al servizio e supporto agli utenti.
* Ottime capacità comunicative e relazionali.
* Attitudine all'organizzazione e alla documentazione.
* Curiosità, spirito di iniziativa e desiderio di apprendere.
* Capacità di lavorare in team e di relazionarsi con fornitori esterni.

Costituiscono titolo preferenziale

* Esperienza, anche breve, in attività di supporto IT.
* Conoscenza di Microsoft 365, Teams, SharePoint e OneDrive.
* Interesse verso AI, automazione e strumenti collaborativi.
* Esperienze di stage, tirocinio o apprendistato in ambito IT

Cosa offriamo

* Inserimento stabile in un ambiente professionale dinamico e in crescita.
* Percorso strutturato di affiancamento e formazione.
* Possibilità di lavorare a stretto contatto con partner e fornitori tecnologici qualificati.
* Coinvolgimento diretto nei progetti di trasformazione digitale dello Studio.
* Esposizione a tecnologie innovative, tra cui Microsoft Copilot e strumenti di Intelligenza Artificiale.
* Opportunità di crescita verso ruoli di coordinamento IT e Digital Workplace.
* Possibilità di formazione continua e certificazioni professionali.
* Revisione strutturata del percorso professionale dopo i primi 12 mesi.

Il candidato ideale

Non stiamo cercando necessariamente la persona con il maggior numero di competenze tecniche, ma qualcuno che sappia coniugare affidabilità, capacità di apprendimento, orientamento al servizio e interesse per l'innovazione digitale, con l'obiettivo di diventare nel tempo un punto di riferimento operativo e tecnologico per lo Studio.

Retribuzione: a partire da €25\.000,00 all'anno

Benefit:

* Supporto allo sviluppo professionale

Sede di lavoro: Di persona

title: Project Engineer
description:
**THE POSITION**
----------------

The Project Engineer will join the Global Facilities \& Engineering team at our production site in Noventa Padovana (PD). In this role, the candidate will lead and coordinate engineering projects related to utilities, HVAC systems, equipment installation, electrical infrastructure, and automation, ensuring compliance with GMP/GxP standards.


Working closely with cross\-functional teams and external partners, the candidate will transform business needs into effective technical solutions and manage projects throughout their lifecycle, from design and installation to qualification and handover, contributing to operational excellence and production reliability.  



**Responsibilities:**
---------------------

* Lead and coordinate multidisciplinary engineering projects involving utilities, HVAC, equipments, electrical infrastructure, and automation systems, balancing technical excellence, regulatory compliance, cost efficiency, and schedule commitments.
* Manage project execution throughout the entire lifecycle, from requirements definition and design to installation, qualification, and handover.
* Ensure compliance with GMP/GxP requirements, quality standards, data integrity principles, and applicable EHS regulations.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams including Manufacturing, Quality Assurance, Maintenance, HSE, and Procurement to deliver effective technical solutions.
* Manage relationships with engineering contractors, consultants, and equipment suppliers, ensuring alignment on technical requirements, scope, quality, and timelines.
Advise and approve strategy for deviations resolution and CAPAs implementation.  
* 

**Requirements:**
-----------------

* Master’s degree in Industrial Engineering or a related engineering discipline.
* Not less than 2 years of experience in process engineering, project engineering, or plant engineering/operations, preferably within regulated industries such as pharmaceuticals, chemicals, or food manufacturing. Experience in the pharmaceutical sector is considered a plus.
* Good knowledge of GxP regulatory requirements and qualification activities, including IQ/OQ/PQ protocols.
* Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and Outlook), and experience using AutoCAD.
* Knowledge of project management methodologies and tools (e.g., MS Project) is considered an advantage.
* English language proficiency at B1 level or higher.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively within cross\-functional teams and manage diverse stakeholders.
Well\-developed organizational and prioritization skills, with a proactive attitude towards continuous learning, a strong sense of ownership, and a results\-oriented mindset.  
* 

**What we offer:**
------------------

* For this position we offer a limited 24 months contract.
* The gross annual salary for this position is EUR 38 700,00\.
* Free access to the company canteen and ticket restaurants when working remotely.
* A wide range of benefits for your physical, financial, social and mental wellbeing.

A support to develop your own professional and personal paths, including our full range of development programs.  

* 

We warmly welcome applications from candidates belonging to protected categories, in accordance with Law 68/99\.


We foster a workplace built on respect, trust, and empathy—free from discrimination. We are powered by our people, and we believe that our differences are our strengths. Everyone is valued, respected and empowered to be themselves.
company_description: Passionate and talented people who are committed every day to making more health for our patients – both human and animal.

title: Responsabile amministrativa
description:
Grossista di farmaci veterinari sito a Zevio cerca:

**RESPONSABILE AMMINISTRATIVA 2° LIVELLO FULL\-TIME**

**Descrizione del ruolo** La risorsa lavorerà in presenza e si occuperà quotidianamente della gestione delle attività di contabilità. In questo ruolo gestirà la registrazione dei dati, l’elaborazione e il controllo delle fatture, il supporto alla contabilità di base, il controllo dei pagamenti e delle banche e si occuperà della predisposizione di report amministrativi. Collaborerà inoltre con i diversi reparti, mantenendo un flusso informativo chiaro e puntuale e garantendo ordine e precisione nelle pratiche d’ufficio. Il ruolo prevede inoltre interazioni telefoniche e via email con clienti, fornitori e consulenti esterni.

**La candidata ideale si presenta con i seguenti requisiti:**

* RESIDENTE NELLE VICINANZE
* CHE ABBIA MATURATO PLURIENNALE ESPERIENZA NELL’AMBITO CONTABILE\-AMMINISTRATIVO, COMPRESO UTILIZZO DEL PACCHETTO MICROSOFT OFFICE
* PERSONA DINAMICA, DISPONIBILE, RISERVATA E FLESSIBILE IN TERMINI DI ORARIO

**Qualifiche**

* possedere solide clerical skills, con capacità di gestione documentale, archiviazione, inserimento dati ed utilizzo di strumenti informatici.
* buone competenze di comunicazione, sia scritta che verbale, per interfacciarsi con clienti, fornitori e colleghi in modo chiaro e professionale.
* conoscenze di accounting, con capacità di supportare la contabilità generale e la gestione amministrativa di base.
* saper gestire attività di invoicing, occupandosi di emissione, registrazione e controllo delle fatture in conformità alle procedure.
* costituiscono titolo preferenziale diploma di ragioneria o laurea in ambito economico\-amministrativo, buona padronanza di Excel e dei principali software gestionali, attenzione al dettaglio, capacità organizzative e affidabilità.

Retribuzione: €1\.600,00 \- €1\.800,00 al mese

Sede di lavoro: Di persona

title: Maintenance Technician
description:
**Company Description** **About Orient Express**


Artisan of travel since 1883, Orient Express sublimates the art of travel with its luxury trains, hotels, and sailing yachts. The brand has just launched its first hotel, Orient Express La Minerva, in Rome – which will be followed by Orient Express Venezia at Palazzo Donà Giovannelli in 2026\. The experience continues with the recent launch of La Dolce Vita Orient Express train, followed by Orient Express Corinthian in 2026, the first of two Orient Express Sailing Yachts, and finally, the return of L’Orient Express train to railways. Since 2022, Orient Express is part of Accor Group’s leading collection of luxury brands with a century\-old legacy in the hotels and fine\- dining sectors. In 2024, Accor and LVMH entered into a strategic partnership to accelerate the development of Orient Express. Follow the journey at **@orientexpress** on Instagram or visit the website at **www.orient\-express.com.**

**About Orient Express Venezia at Palazzo Donà Giovannelli**


Orient Express will open its second hotel in Italy at the exceptional in Venice. Architect and interior designer Aline Amar d’Amman, alongside her studio Culture in Architecture, has been entrusted to design and decorate the space. Venice, once the gateway to Constantinople and a mythical stop on the legendary Orient Express train – that opened its doors in 1919 with the completion of the Simplon tunnel linking Switzerland to Italy – will be the home of the second Orient Express hotel, set to open in 2026\.

 **Job Description**  

Our Maintenance Technician is a vital member of the Engineering \& Facilities team, ensuring that all hotel systems, equipment, and physical assets operate efficiently, safely, and in line with the standards of a five\-star luxury environment. This role is essential in upholding the hotel’s commitment to excellence, guest satisfaction, and operational continuity by delivering proactive and timely maintenance solutions. The Maintenance Technician works collaboratively across departments to ensure all guest areas and back\-of\-house spaces are maintained to the highest standards of functionality, appearance, and safety.

**Key Responsibilities**  

* Performs regular inspections, preventive maintenance, and repair of mechanical, electrical, plumbing, HVAC, and other building systems
* Responds promptly to maintenance requests from guests or departments, resolving issues efficiently while maintaining guest privacy and minimal disruption
* Ensures all guest rooms, suites, public areas, and service areas are maintained in pristine condition in accordance with luxury hotel standards
* Conducts routine checks and maintains equipment such as boilers, chillers, pumps, lighting systems, fire alarm systems, and elevators
* Carries out carpentry, painting, and minor construction or repair work as needed to maintain aesthetic quality and structural integrity
* Collaborates with external contractors and service providers, ensuring all works are completed safely and to required specifications
* Maintains proper documentation of maintenance activities, inspections, and repairs in line with hotel protocols and regulatory compliance
* Assists in energy\-saving initiatives and monitors utility systems to support the hotel's sustainability goals
* Upholds hotel safety and emergency procedures, including fire, life, and health safety systems, and participates in safety drills and audits
* Supports the Engineering Supervisor and Director of Engineering in planning and executing renovation or upgrade projects
* Keeps tools, workshop, and maintenance areas clean, organized, and stocked with necessary supplies
* Adheres strictly to hotel policies, health and safety regulations, and legal compliance regarding maintenance operations
* Demonstrates a guest\-centric attitude and represents the hotel’s values in all interactions with guests and colleagues
* Participates in departmental meetings and ongoing technical training to ensure up\-to\-date skills and knowledge
 **Qualifications**  

Proven experience in a maintenance or engineering role, preferably within a luxury hotel or high\-end property  

* Strong technical knowledge in at least two of the following: electrical, plumbing, HVAC, mechanical systems, or general building maintenance
* Vocational training or certification in a relevant technical field is preferred
* Familiarity with local building codes, safety regulations, and preventive maintenance practices
* Ability to read technical manuals, blueprints, and system schematics
* Hands\-on, proactive approach with excellent problem\-solving and troubleshooting skills
* Strong interpersonal and communication skills with a service\-oriented mindset
* High level of discretion, reliability, and personal integrity
* Availability to work in shifts, including evenings, weekends, and holidays, based on operational needs
* Physical ability to lift, carry, climb, and perform tasks requiring manual dexterity
* Fluency in Italian is required; basic English proficiency is preferred for guest interaction and safety communication
* Legal right to work in Italy
 **Additional Information*** A competitive package (base salary and yearly bonus)
* Medical Insurance, integrating Collective Labor Agreement one and extended to the family
* Ticket Restaurant
* Annual leave
* ALL \- Heartist® Program: Employee benefit card offering discounted rates at all ACCOR locations and partner venues worldwide.
* Learning \& development: Opportunity to develop your talent and grow within your property and across the world!
* Our commitment to Diversity \& Inclusion: We are an inclusive company and our ambition is to attract, recruit and promote diverse talent.

title: Junior Consultant Governance, Risk & Compliance - Financial Services
description:
**Junior Consultant Governance, Risk and Compliance \- Financial Services**

  


*We don’t imagine a better future. We’re building it.*

  


*Do Work That Matters* **\- Il tuo ruolo e le tue responsabilità**

  



Vuoi fare un lavoro che sia davvero significativo e di impatto? In KPMG avrai l’opportunità di aiutare i clienti, la società, le colleghe e i colleghi ad affrontare e risolvere le sfide più attuali e complesse. **KPMG Advisory** offre servizi di consulenza alle imprese per affiancarle nella trasformazione del business model, nel miglioramento e nella digitalizzazione dei processi, nell'analisi e nella gestione dei rischi, nonché supporto nelle operazioni di finanza straordinaria.



In particolare, entrando a far parte del Team di **Governance, Risk \& Compliance** di **Verona** potrai aiutare le aziende a trasformare i **rischi in opportunità** per migliorare la loro organizzazione e l’evoluzione dei loro sistemi di governance, ottenendo un vantaggio competitivo e offrendo soluzioni integrate e approcci innovativi per la gestione strategica del rischio. La tua esperienza troverà la giusta valorizzazione e ti consentirà di diventare il punto di riferimento per importanti clienti, supportati nel miglioramento dell’efficacia e dell’efficienza dei processi e delle organizzazioni, creando un elevato valore aggiunto e incrementando l’impatto dei servizi erogati.

  



Nello specifico, ti occuperai di:


* Evoluzione della **governance interna e del sistema di controllo interno**;
* **Corporate governance** e **regulatory framework**;
* Sistemi di controllo interno e relativa evoluzione attraverso nuove tecnologie;
* Strumenti di **Data Analysis \& Governance** a supporto delle **funzioni di controllo**.

  



Sarai coinvolta/o su **progetti nazionali** e **internazionali** al fianco di professioniste e professionisti altamente qualificati e lavorerai a stretto contatto con i nostri clienti del settore dei **Financial Services**, tra cui banche, assicurazioni e società di investimento.

  


***Come As You Are \- Le tue competenze e caratteristiche***



Questa opportunità è perfetta per te se hai:

  


* Esperienza di **0 \- 1 anno** presso aziende (compagnie assicurative, banche, asset management) o presso società di consulenza;
* Laurea magistrale o Master in **Economia, Ingegneria Gestionale o Finanza** con ottima votazione;
* Interesse per i **Financial Services** (settore bancario, assicurativo, asset \& wealth management) e buona conoscenza del framework normativo del settore finanziario;
* **Ottima conoscenza della lingua inglese**, meglio se avvalorata da un’esperienza di studio e/o lavoro all’estero;

  


***Your Future With Us \- Cosa troverai in KPMG***

  


* Un ambiente di **lavoro inclusivo**, equo e che rispetta, incoraggia e valorizza le **diversità**
* Un contesto stimolante e dinamico che incentiva la **creatività** e il **lavoro di squadra**
* Modalità di lavoro **ibrida,** per promuovere un sano equilibrio tra vita lavorativa e personale
* Programmi di **formazione** e sviluppo avanzati per rimanere sempre aggiornati
* **Mindset internazionale** e **progettualità innovative**
* Iniziative incentrate sul **benessere psicofisico**


L’opportunità prevede un inserimento in stage o in assunzione con inquadramento ai sensi del CCNL Commercio e RAL di ingresso: € 29\.000, determinata sulla base di criteri oggettivi quali il titolo di studio e la valutazione del profilo rispetto ai requisiti della posizione.



In ottemperanza alla normativa vigente, non raccogliamo né utilizziamo informazioni sulle retribuzioni percepite in rapporti di lavoro attuali o precedenti. Le nostre procedure di selezione sono, inoltre, improntate a criteri oggettivi e neutrali rispetto al genere.

  

***Together for Better – I nostri valori e il nostro impegno***

  



Leadership, lavoro in team, rispetto di ogni individualità, approfondimento continuo, trasparenza, impegno verso la comunità, integrità: questi sono i **Valori di KPMG** che danno vita a un ambiente aperto allo scambio di idee e di conoscenza, che permette ai nostri professionisti di **esprimere tutto il loro potenziale**.



Grazie all’impegno nel favorire un **ambiente di lavoro inclusivo**, il nostro Network ha ottenuto le **certificazioni ISO 30415**, che attesta la conformità del Sistema di Gestione per la Diversità e l’Inclusione, e **UNI PdR 125**, che certifica la parità di genere. All’interno del nostro **Impact Plan** \- Our Impact Plan (kpmg.com) \- trovi riassunte tutte le **azioni concrete** che stiamo portando avanti su tematiche ambientali, sociali e di governance (**ESG**).


**Unisciti a noi!**

  


*I tuoi dati saranno trattati nel pieno rispetto delle disposizioni del Regolamento (UE) n. 679/2016 (General Data Protection Regulation \- "GDPR") e successive modifiche. Per ulteriori informazioni, consultare l'informativa sulla privacy di KPMG.*

  


*KPMG Advisory S.p.A. garantisce le pari opportunità.*

  


**Do Work That Matters \- Your role and responsibilities**



Do you want to pursue a profession that is truly meaningful and impactful? At KPMG, you will have the opportunity to help clients, the company, and colleagues address and solve the most current and complex challenges. KPMG Advisory offers consulting services to companies to assist them in business model transformation, process improvement and digitisation, risk analysis and management, and support in extraordinary finance transactions.



When you join the Governance, Risk, Compliance and Sustainability Services team, you will help companies transform risks into opportunities for the improvement of their organisation and evolution of their governance systems to gain a competitive edge and offer integrated solutions and innovative approaches for strategic risk management.



KPMG Advisory’s Governance, Risk \& Compliance team supports companies in the definition of governance and organisational structures to face the challenges of digital transformation through processes for the management of risks and opportunities. If you are passionate about governance and internal control and risk management systems applied to the financial reporting sector, with an interest in consulting, join our **Verona** team serving clients in the **Financial sector.**

  



Specifically, you will be tasked with:

  


* Evolution of **internal governance** and the **internal control system**;
* **Corporate governance** and regulatory framework;
* Internal control systems and their evolution through new technologies;
* **Data Analysis \& Governance** tools supporting control functions.

  




*Come As You Are \- Your skills and characteristics*

  



This is the perfect opportunity for you if:

  


* you have **0–1 years of experience** in companies (insurance companies, banks, or asset management firms) or in **consulting firms**.
* you have a master's degree or other post\-graduate degree in **business, engineering management or finance** with excellent results (preference for studies related to sustainability matters);
* you have an interest in financial services (banking, insurance and asset and wealth management) and a good knowledge of the finance sector's regulatory framework;
* you have excellent knowledge of English, preferably with study and/or work experience abroad.

  


*Your Future With Us \- What you’ll find at KPMG*

  


* An **inclusive** and equitable **work environment** that respects, encourages and values **diversity.**
* A challenging and dynamic environment that encourages **creativity** and **teamwork.**
* **Hybrid** work arrangements to promote a healthy work\-life balance.
* Advanced **training** and development programmes to stay current.
* **International mindset** and **innovative projects.**
* Initiatives focused on **mental and physical well\-being.**

  



This opportunity is offered as either an internship or a standard employment contract under the collective labour agreement for the commerce sector, with a starting gross annual salary of €29,000\. The salary is determined on the basis of objective criteria, including educational qualifications and an assessment of the candidate’s profile against the requirements of the role. In accordance with applicable legislation, we do not collect or use information relating to remuneration received in current or previous employment. Our selection procedures are based on objective and gender\-neutral criteria.

  

*Together for Better – Our values and commitment*



Leadership, teamwork, respect every individual, continuous learning, transparency, commitment to the community and integrity. These are the **KPMG** **values** that create an environment that encourages the sharing of ideas and knowledge, so our professionals can **achieve their full potential**.



As a result of our commitment to fostering an **inclusive work** environment, our Network has obtained **ISO 30415 certification**, which certifies compliance of the Diversity and Inclusion Management System, and **UNI PdR 125**, which certifies gender equality. Within our **Impact Plan** \- Our Impact Plan (kpmg.com) \- you will find summarised all the concrete actions we are taking on environmental, social and governance (ESG) issues.


**Join us!**


*Your data will be processed in full compliance with the provisions of Regulation (EU) no. 679/2016 (General Data Protection Regulation \- “GDPR”), as amended. For more information, please see KPMG’s privacy policy.*


*KPMG Advisory S.p.A. is an equal opportunity employer.*
company_description: At KPMG, you'll be able to tap into your skills, expertise and passion to help organizations find sustainable solutions to the world's most pressing issues.

title: R&D Technical Writer
description:
**Date:** Jul 10, 2026


**Location:** Badia Polesine (RO), IT, 45021


**Company:** Dentsply Sirona, Inc


**Requistion ID**: 83763  


  

Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies, with over a century of innovation and service to the dental industry and patients worldwide. Dentsply Sirona develops, manufactures, and markets a comprehensive solutions offering including dental and oral health products as well as other consumable medical devices under a strong portfolio of world class brands.  



Dentsply Sirona’s products provide innovative, high\-quality, and effective solutions to advance patient care and deliver better and safer dental care. Dentsply Sirona’s headquarter is located in Charlotte, North Carolina. The company’s shares are listed in the United States on NASDAQ under the symbol XRAY. Visit www.dentsplysirona.com for more information about Dentsply Sirona and its products.  



  

**For our manufacturing site in Badia Polesine (RO), we are looking for a:**  


**Technical Writer**  



In this role, you will serve as the focal point for the creation and management of technical documentation related to our medical devices. As part of the **Research \& Development** team and reporting to the **Product Development Engineer**, you will help ensure that technical information is clear, accurate, and compliant with regulatory requirements throughout the entire product lifecycle.  


**Responsibilities**
* Prepare, update, and organize technical documentation for medical devices in compliance with applicable regulations, with a particular focus on **FDA registrations and submissions**.
* Collaborate with the R\&D laboratory team to collect and formalize technical data and experimental results for the preparation of laboratory activity reports and technical documentation.
* Work closely with different company departments to support project\-related activities, with a focus on the **U.S. market** and **Private Label customer products**.
* Ensure proper traceability, control, and archiving of all technical documentation.

  


**Requirements**
* Alignment with company values of **Respect** (for company standards, vision, colleagues, customers, processes, and work instructions), **Accountability**, **Collaboration**, **Reliability**, and **Agility** (continuous improvement).
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent qualification in a scientific field (Chemistry, Industrial Chemistry, Pharmaceutical Chemistry and Technology, or related disciplines).
* Strong teamwork and collaboration skills.
* Good command of written and spoken English.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office and general computer applications.
* Excellent organizational skills and strong attention to detail.

  

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:** Dentsply Sirona is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will be considered without unlawful discrimination or regard for race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, sexual or gender identity, national or ethnic origin, age, marital status, disability, genetic factors, military and veteran status, or any other characteristics protected by applicable local law.
**Eligibility:** All successful applicants must be eligible to work in the country the position is based.
**Assistance:** If you need assistance with completing the online application due to a disability, please send an accommodation request to accommodationrequest@dentsplysirona.com.
**Agencies:** Please note that Dentsply Sirona does not accept or respond to unsolicited requests or applications submitted by Recruitment Agencies/ Search Firms.
**Notice on Fraudulent Job Offers:** Unfortunately, we are aware of third parties that pretend to represent our company offering unauthorized employment opportunities. If you think a fraudulent source is offering you a job, please have a look at the following information: careers.dentsplysirona.com.
company_description: Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies.
